## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss potential Growth Lead role at growthx.ai with candidate Bianca Nieves](https://fathom.video/share/QKPy6b7yPx3mU2f5VEk-S6DJLdsmzBz9?tab=summary&timestamp=35.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [GrowthX is an agency offering outsourced growth functions, pairing humans with AI workflows](https://fathom.video/share/QKPy6b7yPx3mU2f5VEk-S6DJLdsmzBz9?tab=summary&timestamp=53.0)
  - [Bianca has diverse experience in marketing, growth, and startups, with a strong technical background](https://fathom.video/share/QKPy6b7yPx3mU2f5VEk-S6DJLdsmzBz9?tab=summary&timestamp=200.0)
  - [GrowthX is looking for help in various areas: client work, spinning up new services, and growing the company](https://fathom.video/share/QKPy6b7yPx3mU2f5VEk-S6DJLdsmzBz9?tab=summary&timestamp=194.0)
  - [Both parties emphasize the importance of storytelling, brand building, and human-centric marketing](https://fathom.video/share/QKPy6b7yPx3mU2f5VEk-S6DJLdsmzBz9?tab=summary&timestamp=1009.0)

## Topics

### GrowthX Overview

  - [Agency where customers outsource growth functions](https://fathom.video/share/QKPy6b7yPx3mU2f5VEk-S6DJLdsmzBz9?tab=summary&timestamp=53.0)
  - [Pairs humans with AI workflows for faster, higher-throughput delivery](https://fathom.video/share/QKPy6b7yPx3mU2f5VEk-S6DJLdsmzBz9?tab=summary&timestamp=73.0)
  - [Aims to build a product improving productivity for non-engineering roles](https://fathom.video/share/QKPy6b7yPx3mU2f5VEk-S6DJLdsmzBz9?tab=summary&timestamp=97.0)
  - [Clients include Webflow, Abnormal Security, cloud GPU companies](https://fathom.video/share/QKPy6b7yPx3mU2f5VEk-S6DJLdsmzBz9?tab=summary&timestamp=134.0)
  - [Services include SEO, content marketing, with plans to expand to outbound, social media, link building](https://fathom.video/share/QKPy6b7yPx3mU2f5VEk-S6DJLdsmzBz9?tab=summary&timestamp=169.0)

### Bianca's Background

  - [Non-traditional marketer with diverse experience](https://fathom.video/share/QKPy6b7yPx3mU2f5VEk-S6DJLdsmzBz9?tab=summary&timestamp=300.0)
  - [Worked at companies like Facebook, Bot Society, MIG School, CodePath, Aris, Humanly, and Gitstart](https://fathom.video/share/QKPy6b7yPx3mU2f5VEk-S6DJLdsmzBz9?tab=summary&timestamp=420.0)
  - [Strong technical background and experience with developer-focused products](https://fathom.video/share/QKPy6b7yPx3mU2f5VEk-S6DJLdsmzBz9?tab=summary&timestamp=229.0)
  - [Skills in digital marketing, growth, community building, and startup operations](https://fathom.video/share/QKPy6b7yPx3mU2f5VEk-S6DJLdsmzBz9?tab=summary&timestamp=881.0)
  - [Currently working with marketer hires and has experience running her own agency](https://fathom.video/share/QKPy6b7yPx3mU2f5VEk-S6DJLdsmzBz9?tab=summary&timestamp=650.0)

### Growth Opportunities at GrowthX

  - [Client-side work: partnering with director/VP-level contacts to drive growth outcomes](https://fathom.video/share/QKPy6b7yPx3mU2f5VEk-S6DJLdsmzBz9?tab=summary&timestamp=129.0)
  - [Spinning up new services: e.g., thought leadership, social media ghostwriting, link building](https://fathom.video/share/QKPy6b7yPx3mU2f5VEk-S6DJLdsmzBz9?tab=summary&timestamp=160.0)
  - [Growing GrowthX: launching community initiatives, micro tools, product development](https://fathom.video/share/QKPy6b7yPx3mU2f5VEk-S6DJLdsmzBz9?tab=summary&timestamp=1292.0)

### AI-Led Growth Community

  - [New initiative at ai-ledgrowth.com](https://fathom.video/share/QKPy6b7yPx3mU2f5VEk-S6DJLdsmzBz9?tab=summary&timestamp=1296.0)
  - [Aims to provide value to those who can't afford full GrowthX services](https://fathom.video/share/QKPy6b7yPx3mU2f5VEk-S6DJLdsmzBz9?tab=summary&timestamp=1419.0)
  - [Offers courses and community for $500 range](https://fathom.video/share/QKPy6b7yPx3mU2f5VEk-S6DJLdsmzBz9?tab=summary&timestamp=1427.0)
  - [Potential source for future clients and hiring pool](https://fathom.video/share/QKPy6b7yPx3mU2f5VEk-S6DJLdsmzBz9?tab=summary&timestamp=1392.0)

### Marketing Philosophy

  - [Emphasis on storytelling and brand building over traditional metrics](https://fathom.video/share/QKPy6b7yPx3mU2f5VEk-S6DJLdsmzBz9?tab=summary&timestamp=1497.0)
  - [Focus on creating a human-centric, relatable brand](https://fathom.video/share/QKPy6b7yPx3mU2f5VEk-S6DJLdsmzBz9?tab=summary&timestamp=1621.0)
  - [Inspiration from individual product creators rather than typical startups](https://fathom.video/share/QKPy6b7yPx3mU2f5VEk-S6DJLdsmzBz9?tab=summary&timestamp=1600.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Schedule a mini-project (2-hour timeframe) to assess mutual fit and thinking processes](https://fathom.video/share/QKPy6b7yPx3mU2f5VEk-S6DJLdsmzBz9?tab=summary&timestamp=1652.0)
  - [Bianca to send any additional questions](https://fathom.video/share/QKPy6b7yPx3mU2f5VEk-S6DJLdsmzBz9?tab=summary&timestamp=1713.0)
  - [Jason to discuss with Tucker and reach out with next steps](https://fathom.video/share/QKPy6b7yPx3mU2f5VEk-S6DJLdsmzBz9?tab=summary&timestamp=1820.0)
  - [Potential follow-up call to discuss full-time expectations and role details](https://fathom.video/share/QKPy6b7yPx3mU2f5VEk-S6DJLdsmzBz9?tab=summary&timestamp=1700.0)
